subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto that which is revealed unto thee from the Realm of the Divine Essence, upon the Sacred Spot of Oneness, from the Tongue of Divinity, that verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع لما یوحی الیک من شطر الهویه علی بقعه الاحدیه من لسان الالهیه انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
